hook.command:
python3 -c "
import json, sys
d = json.load(sys.stdin)
p = d.get('tool_input', {}).get('file_path', '')
critical = {{CRITICAL_FILES}}
if any(c in p for c in critical):
    print(json.dumps({'systemMessage': '[GUARD] Critical infrastructure file. Consider /validate-change after editing.'}))
sys.exit(0)
"
